description_long: This is a cylindrical woven basket or bucket with a domed top and a single looped handle attached at the center of the lid. The body is constructed from interlaced natural fibers, primarily beige with decorative bands of pink and reddish hues woven throughout the structure. The weave is tight and uniform, giving the object a sturdy yet lightweight appearance. The handle is also woven, matching the main body in material and color, and is robust enough for carrying. The object appears to be hollow inside, suitable for holding or transporting items. There are no visible labels, markings, or additional reinforcements beyond the woven structure.
description: A cylindrical woven basket or bucket with a domed lid, looped handle, and pink decorative bands. Made from natural fibers, it is lightweight and sturdy.
description_view_0: The front view shows the domed lid, central looped handle, and a clear pattern of pink bands around the beige woven body.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the handle's attachment and a more pronounced display of the pink decorative bands, with the weave pattern appearing denser.
description_view_2: Similar to the front, this view shows the domed lid and handle, with the pink bands visible but less prominent than in view 1.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the symmetry of the weave and the handle, with the pink bands forming a distinct horizontal pattern.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: woven fiber bands at top and bottom
